patches.find: The dome's own evolution log admits the pre-FSF predecessor got 2024 eclipse latitudes uniformly wrong (v31 entry, raw-text/06-evolution.txt).
patches.replace: The dome's own evolution log admits its v31 predecessor predicted 2024 eclipse magnitudes identically across all latitudes (raw-text/06-evolution.txt).
patches.rationale: WIN-025 c5 H1: 'pre-FSF predecessor' is historically incorrect (FSF was introduced in v45, but the log entry labels the predecessor by version number v31, not by FSF-absence). Also inconsistent with detail_verdict_text which says 'pre-v45 predecessor'. Curmudgeon option (a): verbatim quote-faithful to the log.

patches.find: our verdict stands regardless of whether the claim is currently claimed.
patches.replace: our verdict stands whether or not the dome currently lists this as a confirmed WIN.
patches.rationale: WIN-025 c5 H3: verb 'claim' appears twice in six words with pronoun mismatch ('the claim is currently claimed'). Curmudgeon recommendation verbatim.

patches.find: well understood since Chapman (1933, Terrestrial Magnetism and Atmospheric Electricity 38:3)
patches.replace: well understood since Chapman (1919) — with eclipse-specific application documented by Rastogi (1962) and modern conductivity treatment by Yamazaki & Maute (2021)
patches.rationale: WIN-068 c13 H1: Finding now correctly cites Chapman 1919; propagate to detail_evidence ¶3. Chapman's foundational ionospheric work dates to 1919; the 1933 citation (Terr. Mag. Atmos. Electr. 38:3) is a subsequent publication. Matches Finding field attribution.

patches.find: first described by Chapman (1933, Terr. Mag. Atmos. Electr. 38:3) and quantitatively confirmed
patches.replace: first described by Chapman (1919) — with eclipse-specific application in Rastogi (1962) and modern conductivity treatment in Yamazaki & Maute (2021) — and quantitatively confirmed
patches.rationale: WIN-068 c13 H1: Propagate Chapman 1919 / Rastogi 1962 / Yamazaki & Maute 2021 attribution to detail_verdict_text ¶1. Coordinated with detail_evidence and tldr_verdict patches.
WIN-068 c13 H1+H2: tldr_verdict says 'documented since 1933' — propagate the 1919 date. Minor wording suggested by c13 H2 rides this patch.
